answers.a: The ROC is outside the outermost pole
answers.b: The ROC includes the unit circle
answers.c: The ROC is the entire z-plane
answers.d: The ROC is inside the unit circle

explanations.explanations: The ROC is outside the outermost pole

answers.a: The ROC includes the unit circle
answers.b: The ROC is outside the unit circle
answers.c: The ROC is inside the unit circle
answers.d: The ROC is the entire z-plane

explanations.explanations: The ROC includes the unit circle

questions.question: Which of the following is the definition of the Z-transform?

answers.a: Sum of $x[n] z^n$ over all n

explanations.explanations: The Z-transform is defined as sum of $x[n]z^{-n}$ over all n.

questions.question: What is the ROC for a two-sided sequence?

explanations.explanations: For two-sided sequences, the ROC is a ring in the z-plane.
